creator: roar.pettersen@it.uib.no
text:
Installing postgresql82-server + postgresql82-client and php-5 with php5-pgsql

Then php terminates with this error message :

# php -v
ALERT - canary mismatch on efree() - heap overflow detected (attacker 'REMOTE_ADDR not set', file 'unknown')

de-installing the php5-pgsql are making the php working again, but then without postgresql support.
